basic_details.job_title: ECHS Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Medical Specialist, Posts
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS Visakhapatnam) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 5 Contractual Employees Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for healthcare jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max Age for Employment: 66, 68, 56 years. Max Age for Contractual Service: 68, 70, 58 years.
age_limit.details: Medical Officer - 01 (VZM-01): Maximum Age: 66 years. Maximum Age for Contractual Service: 68 years. Medical Specialist -02 (VSKP-I-01 VZM-01): Maximum Age: 68 years. Maximum Age for Contractual Service: 70 years. Dental A/T/H - 02 (KKD-01 VZM - 01): Maximum Age: 56 years. Maximum Age for Contractual Service: 58 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, MD/MS in Speciality concerned/ DNB, Diploma Holder in Dental H/T/A or Class 1 Dental H/T/A DORA Course (Armed Forces)
qualification.details: Medical Officer - 01 (VZM-01): Qualifications: MBBS Experience: Min 03 Years after internship. Preferable additional qualifications in Medicine/Surgery. Medical Specialist -02 (VSKP-I-01 VZM-01): Qualifications: MD/MS in Speciality concerned/ DNB Experience: Min 03 Years in the subject concerned after Post Graduation. Dental A/T/H - 02 (KKD-01 VZM - 01): Qualifications: Diploma Holder in Dental H/T/A or Class 1 Dental H/T/A DORA Course (Armed Forces) Experience: Min 05 Years work experience in Dental Lab.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS Visakhapatnam Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the contractual employee positions at ECHS Visakhapatnam is 22 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Contractual Employees at ECHS Visakhapatnam?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Contractual Employees posts announced by ECHS Visakhapatnam in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for ECHS Visakhapatnam Contractual Employees posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these positions is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post or as instructed.

faq.question: Q4. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Medical Officer post is MBBS, along with a minimum of 03 years of experience after internship.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for the Medical Specialist post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for employment as a Medical Specialist is 68 years, with a provision for contractual service up to 70 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Dental A/T/H post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Dental A/T/H post is Rs. 36,500/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Where should the application form be sent for ECHS Visakhapatnam Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application form should be sent to OIC, Stn HQs (ECHS Cell), Nausena Baugh, PO - Gandhigram, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, Pin-530005.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for ECHS Visakhapatnam Contractual Employees?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification released by ECHS Visakhapatnam for these positions.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for ECHS Visakhapatnam?
faq.answer: The official website for ECHS Visakhapatnam is www.echs.gov.in, where candidates can find more information and download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What kind of experience is required for the Dental A/T/H post?
faq.answer: For the Dental A/T/H post, a minimum of 05 years of work experience in a Dental Lab is required.
